bio: Dr. Ashwani Bansal is a highly experienced heart surgeon in Chamba based in Dera Bassi, specializing in bypass surgery, valve procedures, minimally invasive cardiac surgery, and heart disease management. Backed by strong clinical and procedural experience, Dr. Ashwani Bansal combines clinical judgment with modern treatment pathways and patient-friendly guidance. At Indus International Hospital National Highway, Dr. Ashwani Bansal is known for balanced advice, accurate diagnosis, and treatment strategies tailored to each patient's condition.
